title: Chore: Upgrade Python version
original_text: Upgraded Python from version 3.9 to version 3.11. Updated runtime requirements. Updated CI/CD pipelines to use Python 3.11. Updated Docker images to use Python 3.11. Tested all dependencies for compatibility. Fixed deprecated API usage. Updated documentation with Python 3.11 requirements. Result: all tests pass on Python 3.11.
expected_subject: chore(runtime): upgrade Python from v3.9 to v3.11
expected_body_lines: - Validation: all tests pass on Python 3.11
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(runtime): upgrade Python from v3.9 to v3.11"
